title: Notification No.87/2015-Cus(NT), dated 4.9.15
text: [To be published in the Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, Section 3, Sub-section (ii)] Government of India Ministry of Finance (Department of Revenue) (Central Board of Excise and Customs) Notification No. 87/2015-Customs (N.T.) New Delhi, the 4th September, 2015 S.O. (E). – In exercise of the powers conferred by sub-section (1) of section 4 and sub- section (1) of section 5 of the Customs Act, 1962 (52 of 1962), the Central Board of Excise and Customs hereby appoints the Joint or Additional Commissioner of Customs (Airport and Administration), Custom House, 15/1, Strand Road, Kolkata to act as a common adjudicating authority to exercise the powers and discharge the duties conferred or imposed on:- (i) the Joint or Additional Commissioner of Customs (Airport and Administration), Custom House, 15/1, Strand Road, Kolkata; (ii) the Joint or Additional Commissioner of Customs (Port), Custom House, 15/1, Strand Road, Kolkata, for the purpose of adjudicating the matters relating to show cause notice pertaining to M/s Vesuvius India Ltd, P-104, Taratolla Road, Kolkata issued vide, F.No.DRI/KZU/CF/ENQ-15(INT-08)/2015/1436, dated the 27/30th June, 2015 by the Additional Director, Directorate of Revenue Intelligence, Kolkata Zonal Unit, Kolkata. [F.No. 437/26/2015-CusIV] (Akshay Joshi) Under Secretary to the Government of India -- 1 of 1 --
